reviews.review_description:
I'm a Lebanese/Irish Canadian born in the Maritimes, and I have always felt so strongly in regards to where it is well come from, being the good, the bad, and the ugly sides of things as a Lebanese person we often take such pride in cooking, sports, friends, and family one might ask how being from a place so beautiful and filled with such love and compassion be so war torn and also filled with conflict.
It is not up to one individual to seek those answers but it is however up to us all to come together carry with love and compassion.

Thank you for making this documentary I appreciate it very much.
